REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-28-2020. ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT YINGMING LI APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-13-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT YING LI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
